message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.deg2rad passthrough wrapper (br-franken_numpy-8c71)

Expose fnp_python.deg2rad delegating to numpy.deg2rad(x). Parity test covers:
- deg2rad(0) exactly 0
- canonical angles 90 (pi/2), 180 (pi), 360 (2pi)
- negative -45 scalar
- 1-D mixed-sign array
- integer input dtype promotion parity
- 2-D array element-wise
- aliasing: deg2rad == radians on numeric input
